revision.comment: Made link prefix optional, added item-prefix and item-postfix
Made link-prefix optional, added item-prefix and item-postfix
Added article-postfix. Removed leading whitespace without header.

Protected "[[Template:Catalog lookup link]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: protecting high-use template on request ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
/* top */ trim not necessary for named parameter list-leadout
added leadout-postfix parameter (to specialcase MR template oddities)

Undid revision 855460209 by [[Special:Contributions/Trappist the monk|Trappist the monk]] ([[User talk:Trappist the monk|talk]]) this change requires some sort of change somewhere so as to avoid templatestyles error messages in cs1|2 citation templates;
Undid revision 855471681 by [[Special:Contributions/Trappist the monk|Trappist the monk]] ([[User talk:Trappist the monk|talk]]) restore the change now that the cs1|2 modules have been updated;
「[[Template:Catalog lookup link]]」の保護レベルを変更しました: [[WP:HRT|影響が特に大きいテンプレート]]: 使用数113,000 ([編集=管理者のみ許可] (無期限) [移動=管理者のみ許可] (無期限))
-templatestyles as they are now brought in by the Scribunto module
1 revision imported: importing again with the templates

{{#invoke:Catalog lookup link|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>
[[Category:List of Shikinaisha]][[ja:Catalog lookup link]][[Category:List of Shikinaisha]]

revision.comment: I am shocked at how hard this import was but doing it again. Programmatically changed the xml to reimport and fix the problems I introduced
1 revision imported: running a new import to try to fix the horrible consequences of that
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.

}}

{{documentation}}</noinclude>

Made link-prefix optional, added item-prefix and item-postfix

added leadout-postfix parameter (to specialcase MR template oddities)

Bot: Reverting edits from past 90 minutes

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: re-importing and overwriting due to the weird script failure
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23128882600|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Catalog_lookup_link here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Catalog_lookup_link for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{#invoke:Catalog lookup link|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}}
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
